# Maatsii Chart API for LLMs

Real-time financial chart frames for AI agents and vision models.

Base URL: https://api.maatsii.com
Total Charts: 200
Groups: 25

## Public Endpoints (No Auth Required)

- GET /{id}.jpg?raw=1&cb={unique}   → Direct binary JPEG (c1.jpg through c200.jpg)
- GET /health

**Always use ?raw=1 for direct image data.**
**Always append a unique ?cb= cachebuster on every request.**

## Chartmap (Required for Resolution)

Load the chartmap to translate requests into canonical Chart IDs:

- Full human-readable map: https://api.maatsii.com/llm.txt
- Compact machine map: chartmap-200.json (in this directory)
- Embedded in Grok schema: https://api.maatsii.com/grok.json (see x-chartmap)

## Provider-Optimized Schemas

- Grok (xAI): https://api.maatsii.com/grok.json
- Claude (Anthropic): https://api.maatsii.com/claude.json
- GPT / OpenAI: https://api.maatsii.com/gpt.json
- General: https://api.maatsii.com/openapi.json

## Quick Resolution Rule

1. Load chartmap
2. Map user request → Chart ID (c1–c200)
3. Build URL: https://api.maatsii.com/{id}.jpg?raw=1&cb={fresh}

Maintained with assistance from Grok and Claude Code.
See README.md for full plug-and-play instructions.
